name: Mage
title: Novice
Apprentice
Trickster
Illusionist
Spellbinder
Evoker
Conjurer
Warlock
Sorcerer
Arch-Mage
desc:
Fires a magic missile that always hits its target and does
unresistable damage.
Sometimes a beam is fired instead that hurts each monster
in its path.
The chance to get a beam goes up with your character level.
Lights up all squares within 2 grids of the player, and hurts
all light-sensitive monsters in the area of effect.
If you are in a room, the entire room will be lit up as well.
Detects all traps, doors, and stairs in the immediate area.
Teleports you randomly up to 10 squares away.
Creates an electrical discharge that hurts monsters and destroys
vulnerable items in its path.  Length of the effect increases
with player level.
Detects all non-invisible monsters in the immediate area,
for one turn only.
Shoots a radius-2 fire ball.
Adds charges to a stack of wands or staves.
Chance of success and number of charges gained increase with your
level and decrease with level of wand or staff and number of charges.
A failed attempt to recharge destroys one wand or staff from the stack.
Reveals an unknown rune on an object.
Detects gold and senses objects in the immediate area.
Shoots a bolt of frost that always hits its target.
Sometimes a beam is fired instead that hurts each monster
in its path.
The chance to get a beam goes up with your character level.
Detects all monsters in the immediate area, for one turn only.
Sprays acid in a 60-degree cone, hitting all monsters up to 10 grids away.
Disables traps and destroys doors within a 1-square radius of you.
Teleports you randomly within the current level.
Produces a bolt that teleports away the first monster in its path.
Distance teleported increases with player level.
Grants you resistance to acid, cold, fire and lightning for 20+1d20 turns.
Turns wand or staff energy into mana; tapping stuns the player briefly.
Increases spellcasting speed by 33% for 5+1d5 turns.
A door is created on each empty floor space that is directly
adjacent to you.  These doors are closed, but not locked.
Fires a magic missile that always hits its target and does
unresistable damage.
Sometimes a beam is fired instead that hurts each monster
in its path.
The chance to get a beam goes up with your character level.
Teleports you 1 level up or 1 level down (chosen at random).
This spell may have no effect when the forced descent option is set.
Detects all traps, doors, stairs, treasure, objects and monsters in the
immediate area.
Teleports you to (or near to) a square of your choice.
Fires a short range beam of force.
Shoots a radius-2 sound ball.
Apart from doing sound damage, this also has a chance to stun
each monster in the area of effect.
Shoots a radius-2 shards ball and throws around anything in the area of
effect.
Removes all monsters represented by a chosen symbol from the level.
Uniques are not affected.
You take 1d4 points of damage for every monster removed.
Removes all monsters within 20 squares of you.
Uniques are not affected.
You take 1d3 points of damage for every monster removed.
Shoots a radius-3 mana ball that does unresistable
damage to each monster in its area of effect.

name: Druid
title: Wanderer
Tamer
Nurturer
Gardener
Forester
Creator
Earth Warder
Windrider
Stormwielder
High Mystic
desc:
Detects all living monsters in the immediate area, for one turn only.
Changes you into the shape of a quick and stealthy fox.
While shapechanged you cannot use items.
Magically renders you comfortably fed (but not satiated).
Shoots a radius-2 poison ball.
Confuse a single monster; more effective against animals.
Slows down a monster; more effective against animals.
Neutralizes poison.
Grants you resistance to poison for 20+1d20 turns.
Produces a beam that destroys the first section of wall it hits,
unless it is a permanent wall.  Each monster caught in the beam that
is susceptible to rock remover takes 20+1d30 points of damage.
Maps the nearby area.
Strikes a target from above with a lightning bolt, followed by a clap
of thunder.  If targeting a direction or the target is not a passable
grid in the line of sight, the player will be the target.
Causes shards to explode in a line out of the earth, striking objects and
monsters.  Length of the line increases with player level.
Holds every adjacent, non-resistant monster for a level-dependent
number of turns; animals are entranced for longer.
Attempts to put to sleep each monster within line of sight.
Monsters that resist sleep are not affected.
Gives you the form of a statue of the Drúedain, slow but hard to hurt.
Gives you the form of one of the great eagles of Manwë.
Allows you to take the form of a great bear of the mountains, sweeping
aside your enemies with your mighty paws.
Causes a targeted 4-square radius earthquake.
Earthquakes may hurt the player, damage monsters and destroy items
in some squares in the area of effect.
Artifacts will not be destroyed by this spell.
This spell has no effect when used in the town.
Hastes you (+10 to speed) for a level-dependent duration.
Restores all stats and experience points to maximum.
Speed up digestion to increase regeneration of hitpoints for
the next 5+1d3 turns (or until hungry).
Cures all cuts, poison, stunning and black breath, and leaves you
well-nourished.
Shoots a swarm of 3 or 4 meteors.
Meteors will travel until hitting a wall, a monster,
or reaching the target location.
Meteors will explode as a radius-1 ball that does unresistable
damage to each monster in its area of effect.
If this kills the monster that blocked the path to the target
location, the next meteor may continue to find another target.
Fires a gravity beam that hurts each monster in its path
and has a chance of teleporting it away.
Strikes every monster in line of sight with sheets of ice from above.
Creates a radius 5 ball of fire, followed by a radius 5 earthquake,
around the player.
Spews plasma in a long narrow cone from the player.

name: Priest
title: Believer
Acolyte
Devotee
Adept
Evangelist
Priest
Elder
Prophet
Patriarch
High Priest
desc:
Lights up all squares in a level-dependent area, and hurts
all light-sensitive monsters in the area of effect.
If you are in a room, the entire room will be lit up as well.
Detects all evil monsters in the immediate area,
for one turn only.
Heals a level-dependent amount or percentage of hitpoints, and
cures 20 points worth of cuts and of stunning.
Blesses you, giving a bonus of +5 to AC and +10 to-hit, for a
level-dependent number of turns.
Enables you to see invisible monsters for 24+1d24 turns.
Cures 10 points of damage, removes fear and, from character level 20,
grants you heroism (resistance to fear, and a bonus of +12 to-hit)
for a level-dependent duration.
Shoots a radius-2 or radius-3 ball that does unresistable
damage to each monster in its area of effect.
Evil monsters take double damage.
The bigger area of effect is attained at character level 30.
Fires a beam that lights up each square and hurts each
light-sensitive monster in its path.
Inflicts unresistable damage on each undead monster within line of sight.
Inflicts unresistable damage on each evil monster within line of sight.
Protects you from evil for a level-dependent duration:
all melee attacks by evil monsters have a chance to be repelled,
unless the monster's level is higher than your character level.
Attempts to remove a curse from an item, more effective at higher
character levels.
Teleports you randomly over a short distance.
Restores experience points to maximum if it is currently below maximum.
Teleports you from the dungeon to the town or from the town to the
deepest level you have visited in the dungeon.
The recall effect is not immediate; it is delayed by 14+1d20 turns.
During that delay, the prayer can be canceled by invoking the prayer
of recall again.
This prayer has no effect when the option to restrict the use of
stairs and recall is set, unless Morgoth is dead.
Heals 2000 points of damage and cures all stunning, cuts, poison
and amnesia.
Restores to maximum all stats that are currently below maximum.
Lights up, maps out, and senses all objects on the complete current
dungeon level.
Attempts to improve the to-hit bonus and the to-dam bonus of a weapon.
Attempts to improve the armour class bonus of a piece of armour.
Temporarily makes your melee attacks slay evil creatures.
Inscribes a glyph of warding beneath you.
Summoned monsters can't appear on the glyph.
If a monster attempts to move onto the glyph or melee you while you
are standing on the glyph, it must first succeed in breaking the glyph.
Higher level monsters are more likely to break the glyph.
The glyph will remain where it is, until a monster succeeds in
breaking it, or until you leave the level.
Temporarily makes your melee attacks powerfully slay demons.
Teleports away each evil monster within line of sight.
Destroys everything in a 15-square radius circle around you.
All monsters, objects, and terrain features in the area of
effect are destroyed, except stairs and permanent walls.
You will also be blinded for 10+1d10 turns, unless you
have resistance to blindness or light.
This prayer has no effect when used in the town.
Inflicts unresistable damage on each evil monster within line of sight,
cures 1000 points of damage, cures all stunning, heals all cut damage,
neutralizes poison, and removes fear.
Fires a beam of holy magic that does extra damage to evil creatures.
Casts a radius 4 ball of strong light, and then bathes the entire area
in light doing 100 damage to every light-sensitive creature.

name: Necromancer
title: Acolyte
Curser
Dark Student
Initiate
Slavemaster
Summoner
Controller
Commander
Dark Master
Night Lord
desc:
Fires a bolt of nether magic.
Enables you to see invisible monsters for 24+1d24 turns.
Darkens all squares in a level-dependent area.  If you are in a room,
the entire room will be darkened as well.
Changes you into the shape of a bat, weak but with excellent senses.
While shapechanged you cannot use items.
Detects all monsters which have a spirit in the immediate area,
and then maps in a region around them, increasing in size with
character level.
Targets the nearest undead monster and damages it to gain player mana.
Instantly kill any monster in line-of-sight with less than four times the
player's level in hitpoints, also hurting the player.  Other monsters are
unharmed.
Attempts to put to sleep each evil monster within line of sight.
Monsters that resist confusion are not affected.
Displaces your spirit a short distance, hurting your body as it is
dragged along.
Casts a bolt which wounds, and makes spellcasting monsters less successful
in casting spells.
Attempts to scare a single monster for a level-dependent duration.
Monsters that resist fear are not affected.
Teleports you to the nearest living monster and drains a level-dependent
number of hitpoints, healing and nourishing the player.
Inflicts unresistable damage on each living monster within line of sight.
Fires a beam of darkness.
Changes you into the form of a warg, and gives you temporary berserk
strength, at the cost of some hitpoints.
Teleports away each monster with a spirit within line of sight.
Inflicts damage equal to four times player level on a single monster that
is not undead, an elemental, a golem, or a vortex.
Destroys everything in a 15-square radius circle around you.
All monsters, objects, and terrain features in the area of
effect are destroyed, except stairs and permanent walls.
You will also be blinded for 10+1d10 turns, unless you
have resistance to blindness or dark.
This ritual has no effect when used in the town.
Fires a chaos beam, arc or ball in the chosen direction, wakes everything
in the area, and attempts to frighten everything in line of sight.
Darkens, maps out, and detects all objects on the complete current
dungeon level.
Invokes a radius-4 darkness ball.
Exchanges 50 hitpoints for 50 mana.
Produces a zone of disenchantment affecting the player and monsters
within radius 4.
Allows you to assume the form of a vampire at the cost of half your
current hitpoints, than teleports you to the nearest living monster
and drains a level-dependent number of hitpoints, healing and nourishing
you.  When first transformed you will temporarily be able
to take hitpoints from living monsters with your bite attack.
Deals direct damage to a single monster, more the more damaged the monster
is already, at the cost of 100 hitpoints.
Allows you to take control of a monster, and move it instead of yourself.
Possible actions are move, stand still, 'd'rop, 'm'agic, or 'r'elease.

name: Paladin
title: Gallant
Keeper
Protector
Defender
Warder
Knight
Guardian
Chevalier
Paladin
Paladin Lord
desc:
Blesses you, giving a bonus of +5 to AC and +10 to-hit, for a
level-dependent number of turns.
Detects all evil monsters in the immediate area,
for one turn only.
Lights up all squares in a level-dependent area, and hurts
all light-sensitive monsters in the area of effect.
If you are in a room, the entire room will be lit up as well.
Heals a level-dependent amount or percentage of hitpoints, and
cures 20 points worth of cuts and of stunning.
Enables you to see invisible monsters for 24+1d24 turns.
Cures 10 points of damage, removes fear and, from character level 15,
grants you heroism (resistance to fear, and a bonus of +12 to-hit)
for a level-dependent duration.
Protects you from evil for a level-dependent duration:
all melee attacks by evil monsters have a chance to be repelled,
unless the monster's level is higher than your character level.
Attempts to remove a curse from an item, more effective at higher
character levels.
Teleports you from the dungeon to the town or from the town to the
deepest level you have visited in the dungeon.
The recall effect is not immediate; it is delayed by 14+1d20 turns.
During that delay, the prayer can be canceled by invoking the prayer
of recall again.
This prayer has no effect when the option to restrict the use of
stairs and recall is set, unless Morgoth is dead.
Heals 2000 points of damage and cures all stunning, cuts, poison
and amnesia.
Lights up, maps out, and senses all objects on the complete current
dungeon level.
Temporarily makes your melee attacks slay evil creatures.
Temporarily makes your melee attacks powerfully slay demons.
Attempts to improve the to-hit bonus and the to-dam bonus of a weapon.
Attempts to improve the armour class bonus of a piece of armour.
Encases you and the targeted monster in a stone cell from which only the
winner can emerge.

name: Rogue
title: Vagabond
Cutpurse
Footpad
Robber
Burglar
Filcher
Sharper
Rogue
Thief
Master Thief
desc:
Detects all non-invisible monsters in the immediate area,
for one turn only.
Teleports you randomly up to 10 squares away.
Detects all objects in the immediate area.
Detects all stairs in a wide area.
Adds charges to a stack of wands or staves.
Chance of success and number of charges gained increase with your
level and decrease with level of wand or staff and number of charges.
A failed attempt to recharge destroys one wand or staff from the stack.
Detects all monsters in the immediate area, for one turn only.
Teleports you randomly within the current level.
Prepares you to teleport a short distance after stealing from a monster.
Produces a bolt that teleports away the first monster in its path.
Distance teleported increases with player level.
Teleports you 1 level up or 1 level down (chosen at random).
This spell may have no effect when the forced descent option is set.

name: Ranger
title: Runner
Strider
Scout
Courser
Tracker
Guide
Explorer
Pathfinder
Ranger
Ranger Lord
desc:
Magically renders you comfortably fed (but not satiated).
Detects all living monsters in the immediate area, for one turn only.
Cures all cuts, poison, stunning and black breath.
Grants you resistance to poison for 20+1d20 turns.
Produces a beam that destroys the first section of wall it hits,
unless it is a permanent wall.  Each monster caught in the beam that
is susceptible to rock remover takes 20+1d30 points of damage.
Maps the nearby area.
Prevents you from leaving scent for monsters to track you by for a
level-dependent duration.
Allows the player to turn a staff into a stack of arrows, with quality
depending on staff level and player level.
Hastes you (+10 to speed) for a level-dependent duration.
Leaves a magical decoy that looks and sounds like the player.
Brands one stack of ammunition with fire, cold, or poison
(selected at random) and at the same time attempts to improve
the to-hit bonus and the to-dam bonus of the same ammunition.
The spell has no effect if the ammunition is already branded, has a
slay, is broken, or is cursed.

name: Blackguard
title: Rat
Bully
Thug
Ruffian
Brigand
Raider
Tormentor
Marauder
Destroyer
Tyrant
desc:
Detects all monsters susceptible to fear in the immediate area,
for one turn only.
Removes fear and grants you berserk strength (resistance to fear,
+75 melee skill, -10 to AC, and prevents healing
over time) for a level-dependent duration.
Deals a level-dependent number of melee blows to each adjacent enemy.
At level 5 you do one blow and gain an additional blow every 15
levels (2 at 20, 3 at 35, and 4 at 50).
Destroys an adjacent section of wall or rubble, unless it is a permanent
wall.  Deals 20+1d30 damage to monsters vulnerable to rock remover.
You run up to 4 spaces towards targeted enemy, then perform a
melee blow.  You gain an additional blow at levels 25 and 40.  If you
moved, the number of blows is reduced by 25% for each space, then rounded.
Your mind becomes too focused to be slowed, paralyzed or confused
for 12+d12 turns.
Attempts a level-dependent number of melee blows against the targeted
enemy.  You get 1 blow for every 15 levels.  If any of these blows
damage the enemy, it will be stunned for 6 turns.
Attempts to scare every monster in line of sight for a duration dependent
on player level and monster depth.  Monsters that resist fear are not
affected.
Makes any monster that can move more inclined to run toward you, and less
likely to use a ranged attack (including spells and innate abilities).
Coats all your melee weapons with poison for 18+d18 turns.
With a blood-curdling cry you change into a half-man half-wolf!
In this form you move, attack, and heal faster.
Gives you a powerful desire to kill, increased every time you satisfy it.
Gives you extra melee damage and extra blows, but comes
with dangerous side-effects.
Restores STR, INT, CON, and experience at the cost of 66 HP.
Attempts a melee blow that deals additional force damage when it hits,
knocking the target back with a chance to stun it.
Causes a radius 13 earthquake centered around the player.
